texto: And then there's the perverse joy of subtly working in references to marathon training in daily life, say at the post office or while waiting outside my first-graders' classrooms at the end of the school day.
explicacao: Citação de Sarah Bowen Shea sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “And then there's the perverse joy of subtly working in references to marathon training in daily l…” articula trabalho, humor, marathon em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e dia-chuvoso.

texto: A typical race morning usually starts out looking like a scene from a zombie movie: individuals or pairs of people walking down a deserted street, all headed in the same direction.... Inevitably, regardless of the weather, U2's "Beautiful Day" streams out of loudspeakers.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sarah Bowen Shea: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “A typical race morning usually starts out looking like a scene from a zombie movie: individuals o…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, running, typical pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de bom-dia e running.
